name: Buffalo Trace Park
description: Come play pickleball at Buffalo Trace Park in Palmyra, IN! There are 6 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like water and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $5 fee to access the park. Most of the time the guard shack is closed

name: Harrison County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Harrison County YMCA in Corydon, IN! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.
